articles.title: Dogecoin Holders Can Now Buy A Tesla Using DOGE
articles.description: Dogecoin has been pushed recently as a payment method for various things. Things like the Dogecoin festival accepting payments for tickets in Dogecoin. And Mark Cuban announcing his basketball team, the Dallas Mavericks, would start accepting payments in Doge. But one that the community had been waiting for was being able to pay for Tesla […]

articles.title: Team officially re-establishes Dogecoin Foundation after 6 years
articles.description: Advisery board members for the foundation include Vitalik Buterin, Billy Markus, Max Keller and Neuralink CEO Jared Birchall — representing Elon Musk’s interests.

articles.title: Elon Musk Associate Joins Dogecoin Foundation's Advisory Board
articles.description: The head of Elon Musk’s family office is now on the advisory board of the re-established Dogecoin Foundation

articles.title: Axie Infinity Targets $100 After Crucial Breakout
articles.description: Axie Infinity has experienced a significant breakout, prompting analysts to set a target price of $100 for the cryptocurrency. This development suggests renewed investor confidence and potential growth for the popular play-to-earn game, which has been closely watched in the crypto market.

articles.title: Soul Music Legend Dionne Warwick Set to Headline Dogecoin ($DOGE) Festival
articles.description: Dionne Warwick, who is an American singer, actress, television host, and former Goodwill Ambassador for the UN’s Food and Agriculture Organization, is set to headline Dogecoin’s “Dogepalooza” festival in October. According to the event’s website, DOGE supporters are planning to gather in celebration of the meme-based cryptocurrency with a festival held in Sugar Land, Texas on October 9....

articles.title: Elon Musk-Touted Dogecoin Rejected by Bitstamp Boss
articles.description: Don't expect to see Dogecoin getting listed on Bitstamp anytime soon

articles.title: Music Streaming Platform Audius Surges 143% on TikTok Integration
articles.description: Audius, a music streaming platform, experienced a significant 143% increase in its value following the integration with TikTok, enhancing its visibility and accessibility to a broader audience.

articles.title: Billionaire Investor Mark Cuban Says Dogecoin ($DOGE) Is “The People’s Way To Pay”
articles.description: Two days after billionaire Mark Cuban said that Dogecoin ($DOGE) is the most popular cryptoasset for crypto payments, Peurto Rico based IT firm BOTS Inc. announced that it is now possible to buy second-hand Tesla cars with $DOGE. Dogecoin was initially released on 6 December 2013, as a “fun and friendly internet currency.” It was created by […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Falls Behind in Terms of Network Fees and Usage
articles.description: The amount of money generated in network fees is often considered an important indication of the usage of that network — and Bitcoin appears to be falling behind other blockchains.

articles.title: Cardano sees inflows of $1.3M amid 6th week of outflows from crypto funds
articles.description: Digital asset investment products saw outflows of US$22 million last week — the sixth consecutive week of outflows, according to CoinShares, Europe’s largest digital assets fund manager. Fast facts Total outflows for the past six weeks amount to US$115 million and mark the longest run of consecutive outflows since January 2018, CoinShares reported. However, the […]

articles.title: Cardano Creator Charles Hoskinson Dismisses Criticism of $ADA’s Market Cap
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson has dismissed criticism of the cryptocurrency’s market capitalization after it briefly surpassed Binance Coin (BNB) to become the third-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization. Cardano’s price exploded over 1,400% last year and is now trading above $2.17 according to available data, partly because it’s soon launching an upgrade to its network...

articles.title: Cuban Continues Pushing Dogecoin For Payments, Musk Nods His Approval
articles.description: Billionaire investor and owner of the Dallas Mavericks Mark Cuban told CNBC last week that Dogecoin has a solid use case as a payment method. And that the DOGE community is the “strongest” when it comes to Dogecoin as a means of exchange. “It’s a medium that can be used for the acquisition of goods […]
